title: First Product Repo Dry Run Dispatch Console
workOrderSummary: 営業DXリード向けメール一括返信機能を src/leads/ に追加する。tests/**も更新する。
preflightSummary: preflight-789: external-repo-preflight passed, no secrets detected, allowed zones confirmed
executionPromptSummary: Claude execution prompt: add bulkEmailReply() to src/leads/bulk-email-reply.js

dryRunSteps.action: Confirm work order for sales_dx: 営業DXリード向けメール一括返信機能を src/leads/ に追加する。tests/**も更新する。
Confirm connection bridge ready (v27 bridge passed)
Receive execution prompt and task packet (dry-run only — no real execution)
Generate implementation plan (no file writes until human YES)
Review implementation plan; issue YES or revision
Execute approved edits within allowed file zones only
Generate handoff report (no git commit, no push)
Review handoff report via v29 Result Review Console

expectedClaudeActions: Receive and parse execution prompt packet
Generate implementation plan (no edits until human YES)
Edit files only within allowed zones after human approval
Run node --check on all changed files
Generate handoff result report (no git operations)
expectedHumanActions: Confirm work order and scope before dispatch
Review Claude implementation plan and issue YES/revision
Review handoff result report via v29 Result Review Console
Issue final YES for commit candidate (if approved by こさめ/GPT PM first)

verificationPlan.nodeCheck: node --check on all added/modified JS files in kosame-sales-dx
verificationPlan.smokeTest: npm run verify (existing test suite, read-only)
verificationPlan.fileZoneCheck: Confirm all changes are within allowedFileZones from work order
verificationPlan.noSecretCheck: Confirm no .env / secrets / credential files were touched
verificationPlan.humanReview: Final review by こさめ/GPT PM, then じゅんやさん YES before any git operation

rollbackPlan.preDispatch: No changes made in dry-run dispatch phase — nothing to roll back
rollbackPlan.postDispatch: git checkout -- <changed_file> for each file in kosame-sales-dx
rollbackPlan.forbidden: git reset --hard / git clean -f require explicit じゅんやさん YES
rollbackPlan.note: Dry-run dispatch phase makes zero changes to target repo

dangerousActionsDenied: destructive delete (rm -rf, git clean -f, git reset --hard)
recommendedNextAction: Dry-run dispatch console ready. Present to Claude with execution prompt. Await implementation plan before any edits.
